description: Foul smelling garbage piled up near the market area, dogs are eating from it and creating a hazard.
A deep pothole has opened up on the main road, causing a minor accident and blocking traffic.
The streetlight at the school intersection is broken and not working, causing safety concerns.
Water pipeline is leaking on 5th avenue, flooding the pavement with drinking water.
Raw sewage is overflowing from the main drain onto the residential street causing a major stink.
The lane divider paint has faded and traffic signals are blinking yellow at the crossroad.
There is a fire hazard due to a sparking electrical box near the market complex.
Some stray cattle are sitting on the road causing minor slow down of vehicles.
Trash and litter lying all over the public park benches, needs sweeping and cleaning.
Broken pavement tiles on the pedestrian walkway are damaged and causing tripping issues.
A dangerous collapse of the boundary wall has occurred near the public school garden.
Leaking water tap in the public bathroom is constantly wasting drinking water.
Blocked drain is causing sewage to overflow and flood the basement of the building.
The streetlight bulb is missing and needs immediate replacement at Lane 3.
Piles of plastic dump and dirty waste left behind after the weekly local market.
Urgent repair needed for the main bridge road which is uneven and has multiple craters.
Dangerous sparking electrical wire is hanging low from the post over the pathway.
Water contamination has been reported in the municipal supply lines of Sector 2.
An open manhole is left without a lid on the busy crossroad, causing extreme hazard.
Streetlight is not working and lane is dark during the night times.
Illegal encroachment on the public pavement has blocked pedestrian movement.
Foul smell and pest issues due to uncleaned dustbins behind the housing complex.

A broken pipeline is leaking water and flooding the local park area.
